word: G4706 - σπουδαιότερον - spoudaióteron - spoo-dah-yot'-er-on - Very diligently

sections.paragraph:
- Original: σπουδαιότερον

- Transliteration: Spoudaioteron

- Phonetic: spoo-dah-yot'-er-on

- Definition:

1. very diligently

- Origin: neuter of G4707 as adverb

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Neuter of G4707 as adverb; more earnestly than others) that is very promptly: - very diligently.
